name: ASTROTECH Corp
business: Astrotech commercializes its proprietary mass spectrometry and gas chromatography technology through wholly-owned subsidiaries for security detection, agriculture, breath analysis, industrial process control, and environmental testing applications.

exposures.sentence: We are commercializing the Astrotech Mass Spectrometer Technology platform ( AMS Technology ) through application specific, wholly owned subsidiaries.

1 st Detect Corporation ( 1 st Detect ) is a manufacturer of explosive trace detectors ("ETDs") and narcotic trace detectors ( NTDs ) developed for use in security and detection at airports, border checkpoints, cargo hubs, infrastructure security, correctional facilities, military bases, and law enforcement centers.

BreathTech Corporation ( BreathTech ) is developing a breath analysis tool to screen for volatile organic compound ( VOC ) metabolites found in a person s breath that could indicate a compromised condition including but not limited to a bacterial or viral infection.
AgLAB, Inc. ( AgLAB ) is developing a series of mass spectrometers for use in the hemp and cannabis market with initial focus on optimizing yields in the distillation processes.
Pro-Control, Inc. ("Pro-Control") is focused on applying the AMS Technology in industrial process control applications.
EN-SCAN, Inc. ( EN-SCAN ) is developing advanced environmental testing and monitoring solutions, integrating gas chromatography and mass spectrometry technology in rugged, portable designs.

catalysts.event: Launch of enhanced TRACER 1000 Narcotic Trace Detector
catalysts.sentence: On March 10, 2025, we announced the launch of the enhanced TRACER 1000 Narcotic Trace Detector from its 1st Detect subsidiary.

catalysts.event: First TSA-approved sale of TRACER 1000 ETD
catalysts.sentence: In April 2025, Astrotech received a $429,000 purchase order for TRACER 1000 explosive trace detectors ("ETDs") from Intuitive Research and Technology, a TSA approved contractor.

catalysts.event: First sale and deployment of TRACER 1000 NTD in Vietnam
catalysts.sentence: On June 12, 2025, we sold the first sale and deployment of the TRACER 1000 Narcotic Trace Detector in Vietnam, by way of its subsidiary 1st Detect.

catalysts.event: Award of DHS R&D contract for TRACER 1000
catalysts.sentence: On January 14, 2025, our wholly owned subsidiary, 1st Detect Corporation, announced that it has been awarded research and development contract 70RSAT24CB0000015 with the United States Department of Homeland Security ("DHS") to research, develop and mature the TRACER 1000 for DHS next generation explosives trace detection.

catalysts.event: Master lease agreement between AgLAB and SC Labs
catalysts.sentence: On June 13, 2024, AgLAB and SC Laboratories ("SC Labs") entered into a master lease agreement providing for the joint marketing of the AgLAB 1000-D2 mass spectrometer and the AgLAB Maximum Value Process testing method to SC Labs' clients.

On February 28, 2025, we announced the formation of our new wholly owned subsidiary, EN-SCAN, to manufacture and sell a new line of instruments built for environmental testing using its proprietary ATi GC and AMS Technology

tamClaims.claim: US federal government budget of over 6,000 ETD units at checkpoint and baggage screening points
tamClaims.sentence: For the fiscal year 2023, the United States federal government had a budget of over 6,000 ETD units at checkpoint and baggage screening points for which we believe that the TSA would benefit from utilizing our AMS Technology.

tamClaims.claim: U.S. wholesale value of cannabis crop from adult-use and medical states exceeds $6 billion annually
tamClaims.sentence: In the U.S., for example, the wholesale value of the cannabis crop from just the U.S. states permitting adult-use and medical cannabis exceeds $6 billion annually.
